mapper.sql: id, invoiceNo, fullOrderNo, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, adjustType, optCode, createTime, updateTime, createUser, updateUser, price, amount, warehouseCode, pplNo, projectNo, customerNo, groupCustomerNo, inventoryTypeCode, inventoryPropertyId, reason, adjustDate, supplierCode, exchangeRate, currency
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.stock_adjust
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.stock_adjust (id, invoiceNo, fullOrderNo, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, adjustType, optCode, createTime, updateTime, createUser, updateUser, price, amount, warehouseCode, pplNo, projectNo, customerNo, groupCustomerNo, inventoryTypeCode, inventoryPropertyId, reason, adjustDate, supplierCode, exchangeRate, currency) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fullorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adjusttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optcode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pplno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventorytypecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{adjustdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exchangerate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update dbo.stock_adjust
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fullOrderNo = #{record.fullorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

optCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

projectNo = #{record.projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

inventoryPropertyId = #{record.inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},

adjustDate = #{record.adjustdate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exchangeRate = #{record.exchangerate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
